fomod.Name: SkyrimNet Player Needs
fomod.Author: levchimik
fomod.Description: Surfaces the player's state to SkyrimNet: survival needs (hunger, thirst, cold, exhaustion), intoxication (with perk/tolerance awareness), and item consumption. Consumption is reported as native Player Reactions events (configure thought/probability/cooldown in SkyrimNet Settings), and drunkenness is exposed via portable cross-mod decorators.
